summary: Security accepts the local admin gate after R2. The previous P1 fail-closed issue is addressed: the checked-in SESSION_SECRET placeholder is denied and verifyAdminSessionToken() now requires configured non-placeholder auth values before any token can verify.

tests_run.result: PASS: placeholder config and placeholder-signed forged token were rejected.
PASS: build exited 0 with known nonfatal Windows SWC optional-native warnings.

decisions: ACCEPT: local-only scope and production-auth/deployment human gates are clearly documented.
ACCEPT: placeholder admin password/session secret values fail closed for login, token creation, and token verification.
ACCEPT: middleware covers admin UI and admin APIs, with UI redirects and API 401 JSON for unauthenticated requests.
ACCEPT: no real secrets, external auth provider, new dependency, package-lock change, public deployment, paid provider, or production ownership model was introduced.
requested_action: Proceed to QA review for M7-LOCAL-ADMIN-GATE-001.
